hero.heading: Community Guidelines
hero.subtitle: Our expectations for respectful, constructive participation in the LumenLingo community.

introduction.heading: Introduction
introduction.p1: LumenLingo is a language-learning community built on mutual respect, curiosity, and a shared desire to grow. These guidelines set expectations for all community interactions — whether in-app discussions, user-generated content, shared flashcard sets, or any future social features.
introduction.p2: By using community features within LumenLingo, you agree to follow these guidelines. Violation may result in content removal, feature restrictions, or account suspension.

acceptableUse.heading: Acceptable Use
acceptableUse.li1: Share language-learning tips, vocabulary, and cultural insights
acceptableUse.li2: Provide constructive, respectful feedback to fellow learners
acceptableUse.li3: Create and share flashcard sets, mnemonics, and study aids
acceptableUse.li4: Participate in discussions about language, culture, and learning strategies
acceptableUse.li5: Report content or behaviour that violates these guidelines

prohibitedContent.heading: Prohibited Content & Behaviour
prohibitedContent.p1: The following are strictly prohibited in all community spaces:
prohibitedContent.li1: Hate speech — content targeting individuals or groups based on race, ethnicity, religion, gender, sexual orientation, disability, or national origin
prohibitedContent.li2: Harassment — bullying, intimidation, stalking, doxxing, or unwanted contact directed at another user
prohibitedContent.li3: Spam — unsolicited commercial messages, promotional content, chain messages, or repetitive posts that disrupt the community
prohibitedContent.li4: Illegal content — material that violates applicable laws, including but not limited to content involving the exploitation of minors, incitement to violence, or terrorism-related content
prohibitedContent.li5: Explicit or sexual content — pornographic material, graphic violence, or content not suitable for a general audience
prohibitedContent.li6: Misinformation — deliberately false or misleading content about language, culture, or any other subject
prohibitedContent.li7: Impersonation — pretending to be another user, LumenLingo staff, or any other person or entity
prohibitedContent.li8: Intellectual property violation — sharing copyrighted material without permission, including content from textbooks, other learning platforms, or proprietary resources

contentModeration.heading: Content Moderation
contentModeration.p1: LumenLingo uses a combination of automated and human review to enforce these guidelines:
contentModeration.li1: Automated filters — machine-learning and keyword-based systems flag potentially problematic content for review before or shortly after publication
contentModeration.li2: Human review — a dedicated moderation team reviews flagged content and user reports, typically within 24 hours
contentModeration.li3: Proactive monitoring — we periodically review community spaces to identify emerging issues or patterns of misuse
contentModeration.li4: Transparent actions — when content is removed or an account is restricted, we notify the affected user with an explanation and instructions for appeal
contentModeration.p2: Our moderation decisions are guided by these guidelines, applicable law (including the EU Digital Services Act), and the principle of proportionality.

reporting.heading: Reporting Mechanism
reporting.p1: If you encounter content or behaviour that violates these guidelines, you can report it through:
reporting.li1: In-app report button — available on all user-generated content (tap the three-dot menu and select 'Report')
reporting.li2: Email — send reports to community@lumenshore.com with a description of the issue and any screenshots or links
reporting.li3: Contact form — use our Contact page to submit a detailed report
reporting.li4: Trusted flaggers — organisations designated under the EU Digital Services Act receive priority review for their reports
reporting.p2: All reports are treated confidentially. We do not disclose the identity of reporters to the reported user.

enforcement.heading: Enforcement Actions
enforcement.p1: When a violation is confirmed, LumenLingo may take one or more of the following actions, proportionate to the severity:
enforcement.li1: Warning — a private notice explaining the violation and expectations for future conduct
enforcement.li2: Content removal — the offending content is removed and the user is notified
enforcement.li3: Temporary restriction — reduced access to community features for a defined period (e.g. 7 or 30 days)
enforcement.li4: Account suspension or termination — permanent removal from the community for serious or repeated violations
enforcement.p2: Repeat violations result in escalating enforcement. Criminal activity is reported to the relevant authorities.

appeals.heading: Appeal Process
appeals.p1: If you believe a moderation decision was made in error, you may appeal:
appeals.li1: Submit an appeal via email to appeals@lumenshore.com within 14 days of the enforcement action, including your account identifier and a clear explanation of why you believe the decision was incorrect
appeals.li2: Appeals are reviewed by a moderator who was not involved in the original decision, typically within 7 business days
appeals.li3: EU users may also refer complaints to the Digital Services Coordinator in their Member State or to a certified out-of-court dispute settlement body under DSA Article 21

ugcTerms.heading: User-Generated Content Terms
ugcTerms.p1: When you create or share content through LumenLingo (including flashcard sets, comments, translations, and study notes), the following terms apply:
ugcTerms.li1: You retain ownership — you remain the owner of any original content you create and share through the Service
ugcTerms.li2: Licence grant — by sharing content, you grant LumenShore Limited a worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free licence to host, display, reproduce, modify (e.g. for formatting), and distribute your content within the Service, solely for the purpose of operating and improving LumenLingo
ugcTerms.li3: Right to remove — LumenShore reserves the right to remove any content that violates these guidelines, our Terms of Service, or applicable law, without prior notice where urgency requires
ugcTerms.li4: User responsibility — you are responsible for ensuring your content does not infringe third-party intellectual property rights or violate any applicable law
ugcTerms.li5: Indemnification — you agree to indemnify and hold harmless LumenShore Limited from any claims arising from content you create or share through the Service

dsaCompliance.heading: EU Digital Services Act Compliance
dsaCompliance.p1: In accordance with Regulation (EU) 2022/2065 (the Digital Services Act), LumenLingo as an intermediary service provider:
dsaCompliance.li1: Maintains a single point of contact for competent authorities and users — reachable at dsa@lumenshore.com
dsaCompliance.li2: Publishes this transparency notice as part of our Terms of Service and Community Guidelines
dsaCompliance.li3: Provides a notice-and-action mechanism for reporting illegal content, accessible through the reporting channels described above
dsaCompliance.li4: Issues statements of reasons when content is removed or accounts are restricted, including the legal or contractual basis and information on available redress
dsaCompliance.li5: Publishes an annual transparency report covering content moderation actions, report volumes, and average response times, available on our corporate governance page

changes.heading: Changes to These Guidelines
changes.p1: We may update these guidelines as we introduce new community features or in response to evolving legal requirements. Material changes will be announced in-app and on our website. Continued use of community features after changes constitutes acceptance.

meta.title: Zaява pro dostuphist — LumenLingo
meta.description: Zaява pro dostuphist LumenLingo vidpovidho do Yevropeyskoho aktu pro dostuphist (EAA) ta WCAG 2.1 AA. Status vidpovidnosti, EN 301 549, vidomi obmezhehnya, hrafiky vypravleh ta povidomlehnya pro problemy.
meta.ogDescription: Nashe zobovyazahnya zrobyty vyvchehnya mov dostupnym dlya vsikh, z detalyamy vidpovidnosti EAA ta hrafikamy vypravleh.

hero.heading: Zaява pro dostuphist
hero.subtitle: Vyvchehnya mov maye buty dostupnym dlya vsikh. My zobovyazuyemos zrobyty LumenLingo dostupnym dlya vsikh korystuvachiv, nezalezhho vid yikhnikh mozhlyvostey.

commitment.heading: Nashe zobovyazahnya
commitment.p1: LumenShore Ltd zobovyazuyetsya zabezpechuváty tsyfrovu dostuphist dlya lyudey z invalidhistyu. My postiyho pokrashchuyemo korystuvatskyy dosvid dlya vsikh ta zastosovuyemo vidpovidni standarty dostupnosti yak do nashoho veb-saytu, tak i do dodatku LumenLingo dlya iOS.

eaaScope.heading: Sfera dii Yevropeyskoho aktu pro dostuphist (EAA)
eaaScope.p1: <eaaLink>Yevropeysky akt pro dostuphist (Dyrektyva 2019/882)</eaaLink> nabrav chyhnosti 28 chervnya 2025 roku, vymahauychy vid tsyfrovykh posluh, shcho proponuyutsya spozhyvacham v YES, vidpovidnosti standartam dostupnosti.
eaaScope.p2: LumenLingo prodaye tsyfrovi pidpysky na vyvchehnya mov spozhyvacham u derzhavakh-chlenakh YES. Yak servis elektronhoyi komertsiyi z suputnim veb-saytom ta mobilnym dodatkom, LumenLingo pidpadaye pid sfeру dii EAA. Vidpovidnist vymahaуe dotrymannya harmonizovanoho yevropeyskoho standartu <enLink>EN 301 549</enLink>, yaky posylayetsya na WCAG 2.1 riven AA dlya veb-kontentu ta peredbachaye dddatkovi vymohy dlya mobilnykh dodatkiv.

usAccessibility.heading: Dostuphist u SShA (ADA ta Sektsiya 508)
usAccessibility.p1: Sudy SShА dedali chastishe tlumachat <adaLink>Rozdil III Zakonu pro amerikantsiv z invalidhistyu (ADA)</adaLink> yak taky, shcho zastosovuyetsya do veb-saytiv ta mobilnykh dodatkiv. Khocha ADA ne vstanhovlyuye formalnykh standartiv veb-dostupnosti, WCAG 2.1 riven AA ye de-fakto haluzevym standartom, na yaky posylayetsya Departament yustyrtsiyi.
usAccessibility.p2: LumenLingo oriyentuyetsya na WCAG 2.1 riven AA yak dlya nashoho veb-saytu, tak i dlya dodatku iOS, shcho vidpovidaye vymoham ADA shchodo rivnoho dostupu do tsyfrovykh posluh. Nash status vidpovidnosti, vidomi obmezhehnya ta hrafiky vypravleh zadokumentovani na tsiy storintsi ta v nashomu <vpatLink>Dobrovilnomu shabloni dostupnosti produktu (VPAT)</vpatLink>.
usAccessibility.p3: Sektsiya 508 zastosovuyetsya do federalnykh ahentsiy SShA ta yikhnikh pidryadnykiv. LumenShore Ltd hа danOy moment ne ukladaye dohovoriv z federalnymy ahentsiyamy SShA, tomu Sektsiya 508 ne zastosovuyetsya bezposerednо. Prote nasha mеta vidpovidnosti WCAG 2.1 AA vidpovidaye ekvivalentnomu tekhnichnomu standartu Sektsii 508 (yaky posylayetsya na WCAG 2.0 riven AA).

conformance.heading: Status vidpovidnosti
conformance.p1: <wcagLink>Nastanovy z dostupnosti veb-kontentu (WCAG)</wcagLink> vyznachayut vymohy dlya dyzayneriv ta rozrobhykiv dlya pokrashchehnya dostupnosti dlya osib z invalidhistyu. Vony vyznáchayut try rivni vidpovidnosti: riven A, riven AA ta riven AAA.
conformance.p2: lumenlingo.com chastkovo vidpovidaye WCAG 2.1 riven AA ta EN 301 549 v3.2.1. "Chastkovo vidpovidaye" oznáchaye, shcho deyaki chastyhy kontentu ne povhistyu vidpovidayut standartu dostupnosti. Vidomi nevtdpovidnosti perelиcheni nyzhche z hratfikamy vypravleh. My aktyvno pratsyuyemo nad povhoyu vidpovidhistyu.
conformance.p3: Dodatok LumenLingo iOS chastkovo vidpovidaye vymoham EN 301 549 dlya ne-veb-prohraмноhо zabespechennya (Punkt 11). Dodatok oriyentuyetsya na WCAG 2.1 riven AA de tse zastosovno ta realizuye API dostupHosti platformy (VoiceOver, Zmenshennya rukhu) dlya kluchOvykh vzayemodiy.

measures.heading: Zakhody, yаki my vzhyvayemo
measures.intro: LumenShore vzhyvaye nastupni zakhody dlya zabezpechennya dostupnosti lumenlingo.com:
measures.li1: Intehratsiуa dostupnosti v nash protses dyzaynu ta rozrobky
measures.li2: Vykorystahnya semantychnykh elementiv HTML ta oriуentyriv ARIA dlya struktury storinky
measures.li3: Pidtrymka spivvidnosheh kontrastu koloriv, shcho vidpovidayut abo perevyshchuyut standarty WCAG 2.1 AA (4,5:1 dlya zvychaynoho tekstu, 3:1 dlya velykoho tekstu)
measures.li4: Nadannya vydymykh indykatoriv fokusu na vsikh interaktyvnykh elementakh
measures.li5: Zabezpechennya navihatsiyi po vsomu kontentu lyshe za dopomohoyu klaviatury
measures.li6: Povazhahnya systemhoho nalashtuvannya prefers-reduced-motion — vsi animatsiyi vymykayutsya, koly tse nalashtuvannya aktyvne
measures.li7: Nadannya zmistoohogo alternatyvnoho tekstu dlya zobrazhen ta dekoratyvnykh elementiv
measures.li8: Vklyuchehnya posylahnya dlya propusku do kontentu dlya korystuvachiv klaviatury
measures.li9: Testuvannya z ekrannymy dyktoRAmy, vklyuchayuchy VoiceOver na macOS ta iOS

knownLimitations.heading: Vidomi obmezhehnya ta vypravlehnya
knownLimitations.intro: Nezvazhayuchy na nashi nAYkrashchi zusyllya, deyaki oblasti mayut obmezhehnya, yaki my aktyvno vypravlyayemo. Vidpovidho dо EAA, myzhche perelihuyemo vidomi nevtdpovidnosti z planoвanymy hrafikamy vyPravleh.
knownLimitations.websiteLi1: Karusel skrinshotiv: Vzayemodiya svaypu vymahAye dotykоoho abo myshachoho vvodu. Navihatsiya za dopomohoyu klaviatury cherez klavishi zi strIlkamy nadayetsya yak alternatyva.
knownLimitations.websiteLi1Status: Status: Alternatyvu nadano. Dodatkovi dii ne potribni.
knownLimitations.websiteLi2: Efekty glassmorphism: Vizualni efekty rozmyttya fonu mozhut he vidobrazhAtysya v usikh brauzerakh. Kontent zalyshayetsya povhistyu chytabelhym u vsikh vypadkakh.
knownLimitations.websiteLi2Status: Status: Plаvna dehradatsiya. Dodatkovi dii ne potribni.
knownLimitations.iosLi1: Mitky VoiceOver (WCAG 4.1.2 — Imya, Rol, Znachehnya): Klyuchovi interaktyvni elementy (katehoriyi, fleshkarty, beidzhi uchasnykiv, panel instrumentiv eksportu PDF, zhortani sektsiyi) mistyat mitky ta pidkaZky VoiceOver. Blyzhko 15% vyglyadiv mayut yavni mitky dostupnosti; reshta spoklAdayetsya na vbudovanu dostuphist SwiftUI dlya standаrtnykh kontroliv (knopky, peremikaKhi, tekst). Koristuvatski dekoratyvni vyhlyady (skliani kartky, efekty paralaksu) ne mayut yavnykh opysiv.
knownLimitations.iosLi1Target: Mеta: Q3 2026 — Dodaty yavni mitky VoiceOver do vsikh koristuvаtskykh vyglyadiv ta elementiv hry.
knownLimitations.iosLi2: Dynamichnyy typ (WCAG 1.4.4 — Zmina rozmiru tekstu): Dodatok iOS shche ne pidtrymуye povhistyu dynamichnyy typ. Blyzhko 87% tekstu vykorystovuye fiksovani rozmiry, optymizovani pid dyzayn glassmorphism. Корystuvachi, yaki poklAdayutsya na bilshi rozmiry tekstu, mozhut he bachyty масshtabuvannya vsoho tekstu. Mihratsiya na masshtabovani styli tekstu zаplanovana.
knownLimitations.iosLi2Target: Meta: Q4 2026 — Mihruvaty na @ScaledMetric ta semantychni styli shryftiv v usikh vyhlyadakh.
knownLimitations.iosLi3: Zmenshennya rukhu (WCAG 2.3.3 — Animatsiya vid vzayemodii): Vsi osnovni vyHlyady z intehsyvnymy animatsiyamy (perehortahnya kartok, efekty paralaksu, svyatkuvannya chastynok, sektsiyi zhortahnya/rozhortahnya, animatsiyi eksportu PDF) povazhayut systemhe nalashtuvannya Zmenshennya rukhu. Fohnovi рenderery nebulosiv prodovzhuyut animatsii yak суто dekoratyvnyy kontent.
knownLimitations.iosLi3Status: Status: Vidpovidaye dlya interaktyvnykh animatsiy. Dekoratyvni animatsiyi vyklyucheni na pidstavi vynуatku WCAG.
knownLimitations.iosLi4: Rozmіr tsili (WCAG 2.5.8 — Minimalnуy rozmіr tsili): Bilshist interaktyvhykh tsilEy vidpovidaye minimumu 44x44pt. Deyaki menshi knopky z ikonkamy u drihoryadnykh vyhlyadakh mozhut buty nyzhche tsoho porohu.
knownLimitations.iosLi4Target: Meta: Q3 2026 — Provesty audyt usikh dotуkovykh tsiley ta zabezpechyty mInimum 44pt.
knownLimitations.outro: My aktyvno pratsyuyemo nad identyfikatsiyeyu ta усuhehhyam prohalуn u dostupnosti. Nasha dorozhnya karta vklyuchaye shchokvartal'ni audyty dostupnosti (dyv. nyzhche).

alternatives.heading: Alternatyvni sposoby dostupu do kontentu
alternatives.intro: Yakshcho vy maуete trudnoshchi z korystuvahnyam bud-yakoyu chastyhOyu LumenLingo, dostupni nastupni alternatyvy:
alternatives.li1: Pidtrymka elektronhoyu poshtoyu: Zvyazhitsya z namy za adresoyu accessibility@lumenshore.com, i my nadamo vam potribnуy kontent u dostuphоmu formAti (zvychaynyy tekst, audio-opys abo altErnatyvnyy maket).
alternatives.li2: Navihatsiya za dopomohoyu klaviatury: Ves kontent ta vzayemodiyi na sajti dostupni lyshe za dopomohoyu klaviatury (Tab, Shift+Tab, Enter, Escape, klavishi zi strilkamy).
alternatives.li3: Ekrannyy dyktor: Sayt testuyetsya z VoiceOver. Якshcho vy zиtknetesya z problemamy z dopОmizhnoyu tekhnolohiyeyu, povidomte nas.
alternatives.li4: Nalashtuvannya brauzera: Sayt pidtrymuyе masshtabuvannya do 200%, rezhym vysokoho kontrastu ta invertovani kolory.

auditSchedule.heading: Hrafik audytiv dostupnosti
auditSchedule.intro: My provodymo rehulуarni audyty dostupnosti dlya pidtrymky ta pokrashchennya vidpovidnosti:
auditSchedule.li1: Q1 (sichen-berezen): Povnyy audyt WCAG 2.1 AA veb-saytu (avtomatychhi ta ruchni testy)
auditSchedule.li2: Q2 (kviten-cherven): Audyt VoiceOver ta Dynamichnoho Typu dodatku iOS
auditSchedule.li4: Q4 (zhovten-hruden): Shchorichnyy kompleksnyy perehlyad ta planuvannya vypravlEh
auditSchedule.outro: Rezultaty kozhnoho audytu publikuyutsya v onovleniy versiyi tsiyeyi zayavy.

feedback.heading: Zvorotnyy zvyazok
feedback.intro: My vitayemo vash zvorotnyy zvyazok shchodo dostupnosti lumenlingo.com. Yakshcho vy zitknetesya z baryeramy dostupnosti aho mayete propozyтsiyi shchodo pokrashchehnya, zvernitysya do nas:
feedback.response: My prahнemo vidpovidaty na zvorotnyy zvyazok shchodo dostupnosti protyahom 5 robochykh dniv. Yakshcho vy podayete skarhu shchodo dostupnosti, my pidtverdymo otrymannya protyahom 2 robochykh dniv ta nadamo zmistovnu vidpovid — vklyuchayuchy plan vypravleh dlya bud-yakykh pidtverdzhenykh baryeriv — protyahom 15 robochykh dniv.

disproportionateBurden.heading: Otsinka neproporsiynoho navantazhennya
disproportionateBurden.p1: Stattya 14 Yevropeyskoho aktu pro dostuphist dozvolyaye mikropidpryyemstvam (menshe 10 pratsivnykiv ta richnyy oborot nyzhche 2 mln yevro) vymahaty zvIlhennya, koly vidpovidnist nakladaтyme neproporsiyhe navantazhennya.
disproportionateBurden.p2: LumenShore Limited (Nomer kompaniyi 09607326, Anhliya ta Uels) na danYy moment klasyfikuyetsya yak mіkropidpryyemstvo. Prote my he spyrayemosya na tse zvilnennya yak na zahalnyy zakhyyt. Natomist my vzhyvayemo rozumnykh zakhodiv dlya dotrymannya EN 301 549 ta WCAG 2.1 AA, priorytezuyuchy pokrashchehnya dostupnosti z nаybilshym vplyvom u mezhakh nashykh resursiv:
disproportionateBurden.li1: Dostup za dopomohoyu klaviatury ta ekrannoho dyktora do vsikh holovnykh robochykh protsesiv
disproportionateBurden.li2: Vidpovidnist kontrastu koloriv dlya svitloyi ta temnoyi tem
disproportionateBurden.li3: Pidtrymka zmenshennya rukhu dlya vsikh interaktyvnykh animatsiy
disproportionateBurden.li4: Shchokvartalnyy hrafik audytiv z zadokumentovahym planom vypravleh
disproportionateBurden.p3: Koly povna vidpovidhist shche ne dosyahnuta (napryklad, povna pidtrymka Dynamichnoho Typu v dodatku iOS), my dokumentuyemo nevіdpovidnist vyshche z hrafiком vypravleh. Tsya otsinka perEhlyadayetsya shchorichno odnochasno z audytom dostupnosti.

enforcement.heading: Protsedura prymushehnya
enforcement.ukP1: Yakshcho vy ne zadоvoleni nashoyu vidpovidyu na vashu zaнepokoyenist shchodo dostupnosti, vy mozhete eskaluvaty, zvernuvshys do <ehrcLink>Komisiyi z pytah rivnosti ta prav lyudyny (EHRC)</ehrcLink>.
enforcement.euP1: Rezydenty YES mozhut zvERtAtysya do natsionalnoho orhanu prymushehnya u svoyiy derzhavi-chleni YES, vidpovidalnoho za Yevropeysky akt pro dostuphist. Perelim pryzanchehykh orhahIv nahlyadu za rynkom vedetsya kozhноyu derzhavоyu-chlenom vidpovidno do Statti 19 EAA.
enforcement.usP1: Rezydeнty SShA z zanepokoyehnyamy shchodo dostupnosti mozhut podaty skarhu za Rozdilom III Zakonu pro amerikantsiv z invalidhistyu. My zаохochuyemo vas spochatku zvyazatysya z namy za adresoyu <emailLink>accessibility@lumenshore.com</emailLink>, shchob my mohly vyrishyty problemu bezposerednо. Nash <vpatLink>VPAT</vpatLink> dokumentuye nash potochnyy riven vidpovidnosti.

meta.title: Безпека — LumenLingo
meta.description: Політика відповідального розкриття LumenLingo. Як повідомити про вразливості, обсяг, час відповіді та наше зобов'язання щодо безпеки дослідників.
meta.ogDescription: Повідомляйте про вразливості відповідально. Відповідаємо протягом 48 годин і ніколи не вживаємо правових заходів проти добросовісних дослідників.

hero.heading: Безпека
hero.subtitle: Ми дуже серйозно ставимося до безпеки LumenLingo та ваших даних. Якщо ви виявили вразливість, ми хочемо про це дізнатися.

reporting.heading: Повідомлення про вразливість
reporting.p1: Якщо ви вважаєте, що знайшли вразливість у LumenLingo, будь ласка, повідомте про неї відповідально на <emailLink>security@lumenshore.com</emailLink>.
reporting.p2: Будь ласка, надайте якомога більше деталей: опис вразливості, кроки для відтворення, потенційний вплив, а також будь-який код підтвердження концепції або знімки екрану.
reporting.p3: Ми також публікуємо машиночитаний файл <securityTxtLink>security.txt</securityTxtLink> відповідно до RFC 9116.

scope.heading: Обсяг
scope.inScope5: Вразливості міжсайтового скриптингу (XSS), ін'єкції та CSRF
scope.outOfScope1: Соціальна інженерія (фішинг, вішинг) проти працівників LumenShore
scope.outOfScope3: Фізичні атаки на офіси або інфраструктуру LumenShore
scope.outOfScope4: Вразливості в сервісах третіх сторін (Apple, Vercel, Sentry) — повідомте відповідному постачальнику
scope.outOfScope6: Спам, маніпуляція SEO або впровадження контенту, що не впливає на безпеку

response.heading: Наша відповідь
response.p1: Ми зобов'язуємося дотримуватися наступних строків відповіді:
response.item3: Ціль вирішення — протягом 30 днів для критичних проблем, 90 днів для некритичних
response.item4: Сповіщення — ми повідомимо вас, коли проблему буде вирішено
response.p2: Ми триматимемо вас у курсі нашого прогресу та можемо попросити додаткову інформацію для допомоги у відтворенні або вирішенні проблеми.

safeHarbour.heading: Безпечна гавань
safeHarbour.p1: Ми не переслідуватимемо дослідників безпеки, які:
safeHarbour.item1: Діють добросовісно та дотримуються цієї політики розкриття
safeHarbour.item2: Уникають доступу до даних інших користувачів або їх зміни
safeHarbour.item3: Не погіршують роботу сервісу (без DoS, без руйнівного тестування)
safeHarbour.item4: Повідомляють про вразливості вчасно та не розкривають їх публічно, поки ми не матимемо розумної можливості їх усунути
safeHarbour.p2: Якщо ви дотримуєтеся цих правил, ми вважаємо ваше дослідження авторизованим і не вживатимемо цивільних чи кримінальних заходів щодо ваших виявлень.
